scripts.check: node --check app.js && node --check config.js && node --check src/application/error-mapper.js && node --check src/application/state-port.js && node --check src/application/unit-of-work.js && node --check src/application/data-service.js && node --check src/data/repository-contract.js && node --check src/data/local-storage-repository.js && node --check src/data/supabase-repository.js && node --check src/data/repository-factory.js && node --check src/data/snapshot-tools.js && node --check src/data/legacy-state-adapter.js && node --check src/data/state-bridge.js && node --check src/data/state-bridge-metadata.js && node --check src/integration/exercise-management.js && node --check src/integration/exercise-early-init.js && node --check src/vendor/supabase-client-entry.js && node --check scripts/check-supabase-readiness.js && node --check scripts/audit-functional-persistence.js && node --check scripts/check-generated-artifacts.js && node --check scripts/build-supabase-client.mjs
scripts.supabase:lint:db: supabase db lint --local --schema public --level warning --fail-on error
scripts.supabase:gen:types: supabase gen types typescript --local --schema public > src/types/database.types.ts
scripts.test:readiness: npm run check && npm run test:unit && npm run check:supabase && npm run check:generated && npm run audit:functional
